tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: All I Wanna Do Is Make Love To You

content:
Note: the C/D chord change is ahead of the beat, on the last eighth note of the bar. 


[Intro]

[ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]C/D[/ch]      [ch]Bb/D[/ch]    [ch]C/D[/ch]      x2


[Verse 1]
[tab]          [ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]
I've been lonely[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
I've been waiting for you[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]
I'm pretending[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
And that's all I can do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]
   The love I'm sending[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
Ain't making it through to your heart[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]            [ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]
You've been hiding[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
Never letting it show[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]
Always trying[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
To keep it under control[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]
    You got it down[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]
And you're well on your way to the top[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                       N.C.
But there's something that you forgot[/tab]


[Chorus 1]
[tab]           [ch]F/A[/ch]
What about love[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bb[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Don't you want someone to care about you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]      [ch]F/A[/ch]
What about love[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bb[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Csus4[/ch]
Don't let it slip away[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]          [ch]F/A[/ch]
What about love[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
I only wanna share it with you[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bb[/ch]
You might need it someday,[/tab]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]C/D[/ch]      [ch]Bb/D[/ch]    [ch]C/D[/ch]
yeah[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab]        [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]
I can't tell you[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
What you're feeling inside[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]
And I can't sell you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
What you don't want to buy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]
    Something's missing[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]
You gotta look back on your life[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                            N.C.
You know something here just ain't right[/tab]


[Chorus 2]
[tab]           [ch]F/A[/ch]
What about love[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bb[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Don't you want someone to care about you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]      [ch]F/A[/ch]
What about love[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bb[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Csus4[/ch]
Don't let it slip away[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]          [ch]F/A[/ch]
What about love[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]

[Guitar Solo]
